Name: Property-Based Lead Qualification Workflow
Description: Automates lead qualification by integrating CRM leads with BatchData's Property Lookup API. Fetches lead data, verifies property details, applies a scoring system, updates CRM, and routes high-value leads with Slack alerts and task creation. Uses webhook, HTTP requests, and code nodes.

Name: Lead Enrichment & Airtable Update Automation
Description: Automates lead data enrichment from Typeform via Dropcontact, manages contacts in Airtable, and sends notifications on Slack. Integrates Typeform, Dropcontact API, Airtable, and Slack for streamlined lead capture and CRM updates.

Name: Automated Lead Qualification and Deal Creation
Description: This n8n workflow automates cold email response analysis using Gmail, OpenAI GPT-4, and Pipedrive CRM. It checks replies for interest in meetings, qualifies leads with AI, and creates deals in Pipedrive for interested prospects, streamlining sales outreach processes.

Name: Lead Qualification & Slack Notification
Description: Automates lead capture from a form, verifies email via Hunter API, scores leads using MadKudu API, and sends qualified lead alerts to Slack. Utilizes n8n form trigger, Hunter email verifier, MadKudu lead scoring, and Slack API integration for streamlined lead management.

Name: AI Lead Processing & Email Notification System
Description: Automates analysis of incoming lead notes, categorizes inquiries, finds appropriate contacts from a database, and generates email notifications. Integrates ERPNext for lead data, OpenAI for NLP analysis, Google Sheets for contact lookup, and Microsoft Outlook API to format/send emails.

Name: AI Lead Qualification & Notification Automation
Description: Automates lead processing by integrating ERPNext, OpenAI GPT, Google Sheets/Docs, and Microsoft Outlook. Uses an AI agent to analyze lead notes, validate inquiries, find relevant contacts, and generate notification emails summarizing customer requests for prompt action.

Name: Lead Scoring and Outreach Automation
Description: Automates lead collection via an n8n form, validates emails using Hunter API, scores leads with MadKudu, manages contacts in HubSpot, and sends personalized Gmail outreach emails. Integrates MadKudu, Hunter, HubSpot OAuth2, Gmail OAuth2, and n8n Form Trigger nodes to streamline lead qualification and engagement.

Name: Lead Capture & CRM Enrichment Automation
Description: Automates lead capture via n8n Form Trigger, validates emails with Hunter.io, enriches lead data using Clearbit API, and manages contacts and organizations in Pipedrive CRM. Streamlines lead collection and data enrichment for sales pipelines.

Name: Email Validation and CRM Lead Automation
Description: Automates email verification via CaptainVerify API, creates leads in SuiteCRM with validated data, syncs contacts with Brevo, and sends notifications to NextCloud Discussions about lead creation, invalid emails, and low credits. Triggered by Tally Forms submissions.

Name: LinkedIn Leads Scraper & Enrichment Workflow
Description: Automates LinkedIn lead generation and enrichment using Apollo.io API for lead data, OpenAI GPT-3.5 for username extraction and profile/post summaries, RapidAPI LinkedIn & Apify for profile/posts scraping, and Google Sheets for storage and workflow triggers.

Name: Automated Lead Tracking & Notification System
Description: This n8n workflow automates lead tracking by integrating Google Sheets, HubSpot CRM, Slack, and Gmail. It triggers on new Google Sheets entries, logs leads into HubSpot, sends alerts via Slack and Gmail, and includes follow-up reminders for hot leads to improve sales efficiency.

Name: LinkedIn Lead Automation & Enrichment
Description: Automates LinkedIn lead generation, data enrichment, and outreach using HDW LinkedIn API, OpenAI GPT-4 for ICP parsing and content summarization, and Google Sheets for data storage. Includes lead scoring, company research, and automated messaging workflows.

Name: AI Lead Generator: Google Maps & Website Scraper
Description: Automates business lead generation by scraping Google Maps and business websites using Apify actors, enhanced by OpenAI GPT-4o and SerpAPI for fallback data enrichment. Stores organized contact info and business data into Google Sheets for easy access and analysis.

Name: AI-Powered Social Media Lead Outreach
Description: Automates social media analysis from LinkedIn and Twitter via RapidAPI, uses OpenAI GPT-4 for personalized cover letter and subject generation, integrates Google Sheets for lead management, and sends customized emails via SMTP. Ideal for marketers and lead gen pros.

Name: Typeform to HubSpot Lead Automation
Description: Automates lead capture from Typeform surveys into HubSpot CRM, updating contact info and lifecycle stage, then sending a personalized Gmail follow-up. Uses Typeform API, HubSpot API, and Gmail OAuth2 for streamlined lead management and nurturing.

Name: Email Enrichment & Lemlist Lead Import
Description: Automates lead enrichment using Dropcontact API with data from Google Sheets, then imports enriched leads into Lemlist for email campaigns. Uses Google Sheets OAuth2, Dropcontact for contact verification, and Lemlist API to streamline B2B outreach.

Name: Calendly Leads to Notion via Dropcontact
Description: Automates lead capture from Calendly invitees, enriches data using Dropcontact API, and logs detailed lead info in Notion database, including contact, company, and scheduling details. Integrates Calendly webhook, Dropcontact API, and Notion API for streamlined CRM.

Name: Typeform to Pipedrive Lead Automation
Description: Automates capturing Typeform survey responses to create and map leads, organizations, persons, and notes in Pipedrive CRM. Uses Typeform webhook trigger, JavaScript mapping for company size, and Pipedrive API nodes for CRM data entry.

Name: Pipedrive Lead Enrichment & Email Finder
Description: Automates lead enrichment and email discovery using Pipedrive CRM and Datagma API. It enriches new organizations with funding, traffic, and industry data, finds ideal sales contacts, verifies emails, and updates Pipedrive records for streamlined sales prospecting.

Name: Google Drive to Pipedrive Lead Importer
Description: Automates importing leads from Google Drive spreadsheets into Pipedrive CRM. Uses Google Drive Trigger, Spreadsheet File parser, and Pipedrive API to create organizations, persons, leads, and notes, streamlining lead management and CRM updates.

Name: Typeform Leads to WhatsApp via Twilio
Description: Automates sending Typeform survey leads directly to a WhatsApp number using Twilio. Utilizes Typeform webhook trigger, data parsing with n8n Set node, and Twilio API for messaging. Ideal for instant lead notification and follow-up.

Name: Lead Qualification via Email Verification & Scoring
Description: Automates lead qualification by collecting business emails via n8n form trigger, verifying email validity with Hunter API, scoring leads with MadKudu API, and sending Gmail alerts for high-fit leads. Integrates n8n, Hunter, MadKudu, and Gmail for smart lead management.

Name: Lead Qualification & Notification via Form
Description: Automates lead capture from a web form using n8n Form Trigger, validates emails via Hunter API, scores leads with MadKudu API, and notifies qualified leads through Telegram. Ideal for smart B2B lead management and instant alerts.

Name: HubSpot Lead Alerts to Slack
Description: Automates lead monitoring by fetching new companies created in HubSpot within the last 5 minutes, filters those with annual revenue over $5M, and sends detailed Slack notifications to sales reps. Uses HubSpot API, Slack API, and n8n scheduling for real-time lead alerts.

Name: Facebook Lead Ads to KlickTipp Automation
Description: Automates lead capture from Facebook Lead Ads into KlickTipp CRM. Utilizes Facebook Lead Ads Trigger and KlickTipp API nodes in n8n to sync lead data with mapped custom fields and tags for personalized email campaigns and segmentation.

Name: Lead Capture & WhatsApp CRM Automation
Description: An n8n workflow automating lead capture via webhook, logging leads in Google Sheets, adding contacts to FluentCRM via its API, sending welcome emails, and WhatsApp messages using Whinta API, then updating CRM tags. Streamlines lead nurturing for small businesses using Google Sheets, FluentCRM, SMTP, and Whinta.

Name: n8n AI Creator Leaderboard Stats
Description: An n8n workflow that fetches and aggregates n8n community creator and workflow stats from GitHub JSONs, merges data by username, filters per creator, and uses OpenAI's GPT-4o-mini AI agent to generate detailed Markdown reports on creator impact, workflow popularity, and community trends.

Name: Google Maps Lead Generation with Google Sheets
Description: Automates lead generation by querying Google Maps Places API based on zip codes and subcategories from Google Sheets. It fetches business details, deduplicates results, and updates the sheet. Uses n8n with Google Maps API, Google Sheets, and implements retries with exponential backoff.

Name: Automated Custom Presentation Creator for Leads
Description: This n8n workflow automates the creation of personalized Google Slides presentations for each new sales lead by integrating Google Drive, Sheets, and Slides APIs. It imports lead data from CSV files, creates new Sheets, copies presentation templates, and customizes content dynamically to streamline sales outreach.

Name: Lead Generation & Enrichment Workflow
Description: An n8n workflow for automated lead scraping and enrichment using HTTP API calls to fetch personal and work emails, filters leads with valid emails, and saves detailed lead info to Airtable. Ideal for marketers and sales teams.

Name: QR Code Coupon Lead Gen & Validation
Description: An n8n workflow automating unique QR code coupon assignment, lead creation, and coupon validation using SuiteCRM API, Google Sheets, SMTP email, and QuickChart API. Designed for managing discounts in lead generation campaigns.

Name: Smartlead Campaign & HubSpot Data Sync
Description: Automates fetching and synchronizing campaign and lead data from Smartlead API with HubSpot CRM, storing enriched data in Postgres, and reporting via Google Sheets. Integrates Smartlead API, HubSpot API, PostgreSQL, and Google Sheets to provide up-to-date campaign analytics and lifecycle stage tracking.

Name: LinkedIn Profile Lead Collector via SerpAPI
Description: Automates extraction of LinkedIn profiles by keyword and location using SerpAPI for Google search, OpenAI API for data enrichment, and NocoDB for storage. Outputs an Excel file and database-ready lead list for sales or marketing use. Ideal for lead generation with no-code tools.

Name: Lead Capture & Validation Workflow
Description: Automates capturing form leads with n8n Form Trigger, validates emails via Hunter API, updates Google Sheets, and notifies via Gmail and Discord webhook. Ensures authentic lead data management with seamless integration of form, email verification, spreadsheet, and messaging services.

Name: Google Maps Lead Extraction to Google Sheets
Description: Automates extraction of business leads from Google Maps using Dumpling AI API and logs them into Google Sheets. Includes place details like name, address, rating, website, phone, and booking links. Uses n8n HTTP Request, Split Out, and Google Sheets nodes.

Name: n8n AI Agent for Creator Leaderboard Stats
Description: Aggregates n8n community data from GitHub JSONs to generate detailed AI-powered Markdown reports on top creators and their workflows. Utilizes n8n HTTP Request nodes, merges datasets, filters by username, and employs OpenAI GPT-4o-mini for insightful community analytics and trending workflow stats.

Name: n8n Creators Leaderboard Reporting Workflow
Description: Automates daily reporting of the top n8n community creators and workflows using GitHub data sources, OpenAI GPT-4o-mini and Google Gemini LLM for insights. Generates markdown reports, saves to Google Drive, and distributes via Gmail and Telegram, highlighting community trends and top contributors.

Name: HubSpot & Lemlist Hiring Lead Automation
Description: Automates hiring lead management by integrating Lonescale job intent webhook with Dropcontact enrichment, HubSpot CRM for company/contact handling, Lemlist campaigns, and Slack notifications. Tech stack: HubSpot API, Lemlist API, Dropcontact API, Slack API.

Name: B2B Lead Qualification & Email Response
Description: An n8n workflow to capture business leads via a form, enrich contact and company data using Clearbit API, filter for B2B companies with over 499 employees, then send tailored Gmail responses. Tech stack includes n8n, Clearbit API, and Gmail SMTP.

Name: Discourse Lead Enrichment & Slack Notifier
Description: Automates enrichment of new Discourse community members using Clearbit API, filters common personal emails, evaluates company data for lead value, and posts high-value lead info in Slack. Utilizes Discourse webhook, Clearbit enrichment, and Slack API integration.

Name: Leadfeeder Leads Enrichment & Google Sheets Export
Description: Automates lead retrieval from Leadfeeder API, enriches company data using Clearbit API, filters leads by employee count and engagement, and appends or updates results in Google Sheets. Utilizes Leadfeeder, Clearbit, and Google Sheets APIs for B2B lead management.

Name: Email Lead Validation and Enrichment
Description: n8n workflow that triggers from a form submission, verifies email validity using Hunter API, enriches person and company data via Clearbit, and adds valid leads to HubSpot CRM. Integrates Form Trigger, Hunter, Clearbit, and HubSpot with OAuth2 for smart lead collection.

Name: CRM Lead & Company Enrichment Automation
Description: Automates lead enrichment and management by integrating ConvertKit form subscriptions with Clearbit for email and company data enrichment, and HubSpot CRM for searching, creating, updating companies and contacts. Filters out personal emails for targeted B2B outreach.

Name: Pipedrive Lead Enrichment & Slack Alerts
Description: Automates the enrichment of Pipedrive leads with Clearbit data and sends filtered high-value lead alerts to Slack. Utilizes Pipedrive API, Clearbit API, and Slack API, running every 5 minutes to update and notify sales teams about potential B2B leads with revenue and employee criteria.

Name: Reddit Business Lead Finder & Summarizer
Description: Automates extraction of Reddit posts from Entrepreneur subreddit using Reddit API, filters posts by engagement and recency, uses OpenRouter GPT-4.1 AI to identify business opportunities and summarize them, then appends results to Google Sheets for lead management.

Name: n8n AI Agent for Creator Leaderboard Reports
Description: Automates daily aggregation and reporting of top n8n community creators and workflows using GitHub data, OpenAI GPT-4o-mini, Google Gemini LLM, and integrated with Gmail, Google Drive, and Telegram for distributed sharing and local saving. Enables insightful leaderboard summaries and trend analysis.

Name: WordPress Form Lead Capture to Mautic
Description: Automates capturing leads from WordPress forms via webhook, normalizes data (name, email, mobile), validates emails, and creates contacts in Mautic CRM. Built using n8n workflow with WordPress webhook and Mautic API integration.

Name: RetellAI Automated Lead Call & Scheduling
Description: Automates outbound lead qualification calls and inbound appointment scheduling using RetellAI. Integrates Google Sheets (lead tracking), Twilio (SMS reminders), OpenAI GPT-4 (call summarization), and Gmail (email notifications) to streamline call workflows and post-call updates.

Name: Lead Qualification in Google Sheets via GPT-4
Description: Automates lead qualification by monitoring Google Sheets for new entries, using OpenAI GPT-4 (chat model) to evaluate leads based on business criteria, and updating the sheet with a rating. Integrates Google Sheets API and OpenAI's GPT-4 for seamless lead scoring.

Name: Automated Lead Qualification & CRM Deal Creation
Description: An n8n workflow integrating Gmail, Pipedrive CRM, and OpenAI GPT-4 to automatically assess email replies from cold campaigns, identify interested leads, and create deals in Pipedrive. It enables scalable, AI-powered sales pipeline automation with multi-inbox support.

Name: Real Estate Lead Enrichment & CRM Automation
Description: Automates property lead discovery by querying BatchData API with custom filters, enriches leads via skip tracing for owner contacts, scores leads, exports to Excel, and pushes to HubSpot CRM with email notifications. Uses n8n HTTP, code, spreadsheet, and email nodes.

Name: Social Media Lead Analyzer & Email Generator
Description: Automates lead outreach by extracting LinkedIn and Twitter posts via RapidAPI, analyzes data using OpenAI GPT-4, and generates personalized HTML cover letters sent via SMTP. Integrates Google Sheets for lead data and tracking, ideal for marketers and sales pros.

Name: SuiteCRM Drive-To-Store Lead Automation
Description: Automates lead generation for drive-to-store campaigns by integrating Google Sheets, SuiteCRM API (OAuth2), and webhooks. Checks duplicates, assigns coupons, and updates leads with custom fields to streamline CRM workflows.

Name: GitHub Fork Leads to Pipedrive Automation
Description: Automates lead creation in Pipedrive CRM from GitHub fork events using GitHub API and Pipedrive API. Detects fork, retrieves user info, checks/creates person in Pipedrive, creates lead and note linking GitHub URL. Tech stack: n8n, GitHub Trigger, HTTP Request, Pipedrive nodes.

Name: Postgres to Google Sheets Lead Sync
Description: Automates syncing qualified lead data from a PostgreSQL database to Google Sheets, filtering out internal emails. Uses Postgres Trigger, Filter, and Google Sheets nodes in n8n to enable real-time or manual lead data export for easy tracking and contact management.

Name: Salesforce Lead Creation and Update Workflow
Description: Automates lead creation in Salesforce, updates lead details (city), and adds a note marking 'Deal Won!'. Uses n8n with Salesforce OAuth2 API integration to streamline CRM lead management tasks.

Name: Airtable to Lemlist Lead Sync
Description: Automates lead syncing by fetching contacts from Airtable and adding them to a Lemlist email campaign. Utilizes Airtable API for data retrieval and Lemlist API to manage leads and campaigns, streamlining outreach and lead management workflows.

Name: Company Info Lookup via UpLead
Description: An n8n workflow that fetches detailed company information using the UpLead API. Triggered manually, it retrieves data for companies like Apple, enabling easy integration of business data enrichment in automation setups.

Name: AI Lead Scoring & Routing
Description: When a form is submitted via Typeform, AI analyzes the company size and budget. High-score leads go to Salesforce; low-score leads go to an automated Mailchimp nurture sequence.
